name: planewave
description: Install PlaneWave Instruments telescope control software (PWI4), PWShutter, PS3 CLI tools, the real PlateSolve3 star catalog (UCAC4/Orca, ~3.6 GB), and the PWTools portable utility bundle. The catalog installer is build-host-local (staged from C:\MAST\ps3-catalog by build-mast.ps1), not a committed asset; PWTools ships as a committed zip, extracted to the mast operator's Documents\PlaneWave\PWTools. Pinned to mastw/mast00.
